title: viola × balmesii
intro: Viola × balmesii, also known as the hybrid pansy or pansy viola, is a cross between the purple-flowering pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the yellow-flowering Johnny-jump-up (Viola tricolor). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Viola × balmesii include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Viola × balmesii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
